3namespace BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Pipeline;
4
5use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Composer\ComposerPackage;
6use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Config\PrefixerConfigInterface;
7use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Files\FileBase;
8use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Helpers\FileSystem;
9use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\ClassSymbol;
10use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\DiscoveredSymbol;
11use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\DiscoveredSymbols;
12use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\FunctionSymbol;
13use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\NamespacedSymbol;
14use BrianHenryIE\Strauss\Types\NamespaceSymbol;
15use Exception;
16use League\Flysystem\FilesystemException;
17use PhpParser\Comment;
18use PhpParser\Node;
19use PhpParser\Node\Arg;
20use PhpParser\Node\Expr\ClassConstFetch;
21use PhpParser\Node\Expr\ConstFetch;
22use PhpParser\Node\Expr\FuncCall;
23use PhpParser\Node\Name;
24use PhpParser\Node\Scalar\String_;
25use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Function_;
26use PhpParser\NodeFinder;
27use PhpParser\NodeTraverser;
28use PhpParser\ParserFactory;
29use PhpParser\PrettyPrinter\Standard;

31use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;
32use Psr\Log\NullLogger;
33
34class Prefixer
35{
36    use LoggerAwareTrait;
37
38    protected PrefixerConfigInterface $config;
39
40    protected FileSystem $filesystem;
41
42    /**
43     * array<$filePath, $package> or null if the file is not from a dependency (i.e. a project file).
44     *
45     * @var array<string, ?ComposerPackage>
46     */
47    protected array $changedFiles = array();
48
49    public function __construct(
50        PrefixerConfigInterface $config,
51        FileSystem              $filesystem,
52        ?LoggerInterface        $logger = null
53    ) {
54        $this->config = $config;
55        $this->filesystem = $filesystem;
56        $this->logger = $logger ?? new NullLogger();
57    }
58
59    // Don't replace a classname if there's an import for a class with the same name.
60    // but do replace \Classname always
61
62    /**
63     * @param DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols
64     * ///param array<string,array{dependency:ComposerPackage,sourceAbsoluteFilepath:string,targetRelativeFilepath:string}> $phpFileArrays
65     * @param array<string, FileBase> $files
66     *
67     * @throws FilesystemException
68     * @throws FilesystemException
69     */
70    public function replaceInFiles(DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols, array $files): void
71    {
72        foreach ($files as $file) {
73            $this->replaceInFile($discoveredSymbols, $file);
74        }
75    }
76
77    protected function replaceInFile(DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols, FileBase $file): void
78    {
79        if (!$this->config->isTargetDirectoryVendor()
80            && !$file->isDoCopy()
81        ) {
82            return;
83        }
84
85        if ($this->filesystem->directoryExists($file->getTargetAbsolutePath())) {
86            $this->logger->debug("is_dir() / nothing to do : {targetAbsolutePath}", [
87                'targetAbsolutePath' => $file->getTargetAbsolutePath()
88            ]);
89            return;
90        }
91
92        if (!$file->isPhpFile()) {
93            return;
94        }
95
96        if (!$this->filesystem->fileExists($file->getTargetAbsolutePath())) {
97            $this->logger->warning("Expected file does not exist: {targetAbsolutePath}", [
98                'targetAbsolutePath' => $file->getTargetAbsolutePath()
99            ]);
100            return;
101        }
102
103        $this->logger->debug("Updating contents of file: {targetAbsolutePath}", [
104            'targetAbsolutePath' => $file->getTargetAbsolutePath()
105        ]);
106
107        /**
108         * Throws an exception, but unlikely to happen.
109         */
110        $contents = $this->filesystem->read($file->getTargetAbsolutePath());
111
112        $updatedContents = $this->replaceInString($discoveredSymbols, $contents, $file->getTargetAbsolutePath());
113
114        if ($updatedContents !== $contents) {
115            // TODO: diff here and debug log.
116            $file->setDidUpdate();
117            $this->filesystem->write($file->getTargetAbsolutePath(), $updatedContents);
118            $this->logger->info("Updated contents of file: {targetAbsolutePath}", [
119                'targetAbsolutePath' => $file->getTargetAbsolutePath()
120            ]);
121        } else {
122            $this->logger->debug("No changes to file: {targetAbsolutePath}", [
123                'targetAbsolutePath' => $file->getTargetAbsolutePath()
124            ]);
125        }
126    }
127
128    /**
129     * @param DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols
130     * @param string[] $absoluteFilePathsArray
131     *
132     * @return void
133     * @throws FilesystemException
134     */
135    public function replaceInProjectFiles(DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols, array $absoluteFilePathsArray): void
136    {
137
138        foreach ($absoluteFilePathsArray as $fileAbsolutePath) {
139            $relativeFilePath = $this->filesystem->getRelativePath(dirname($this->config->getAbsoluteTargetDirectory()), $fileAbsolutePath);
140
141            if ($this->filesystem->directoryExists($fileAbsolutePath)) {
142                $this->logger->debug("is_dir() / nothing to do : {relativeFilePath}", [
143                    'relativeFilePath' => $relativeFilePath
144                ]);
145                continue;
146            }
147
148            if (!$this->filesystem->fileExists($fileAbsolutePath)) {
149                $this->logger->warning("Expected file does not exist: {relativeFilePath}", [
150                    'relativeFilePath' => $relativeFilePath
151                ]);
152                continue;
153            }
154
155            $this->logger->debug("Updating contents of file (project): {fileAbsolutePath}", [
156                'fileAbsolutePath' => $fileAbsolutePath,
157            ]);
158
159            // Throws an exception, but unlikely to happen.
160            $contents = $this->filesystem->read($fileAbsolutePath);
161
162            $updatedContents = $this->replaceInString($discoveredSymbols, $contents, $fileAbsolutePath);
163
164            if ($updatedContents !== $contents) {
165                $this->changedFiles[$fileAbsolutePath] = null;
166                $this->filesystem->write($fileAbsolutePath, $updatedContents);
167                $this->logger->info('Updated contents of file: ' . $relativeFilePath);
168            } else {
169                $this->logger->debug('No changes to file: ' . $relativeFilePath);
170            }
171        }
172    }
173
174    /**
175     * @param DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols
176     * @param string $contents
177     *
178     * @throws Exception
179     */
180    public function replaceInString(DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols, string $contents, ?string $fileAbsolutePath = null): string
181    {
182        $namespacesChanges = $discoveredSymbols->getDiscoveredNamespaces()->getToRename();
183        $constants = $discoveredSymbols->getDiscoveredConstants($this->config->getConstantsPrefix())->getToRename();
184        $functions = $discoveredSymbols->getDiscoveredFunctions()->getToRename();
185
186        // This is maybe deprecated since regex has been replaced by php-parser.
187        $contents = $this->prepareRelativeNamespaces($contents, $discoveredSymbols->getDiscoveredNamespaces());
188
189        // Prepend <?php if absent so php-parser treats the content as PHP code rather
190        // than inline HTML. The offset is subtracted from all collected positions below.
191        $phpOpenerLen = 0;
192        $parseContent = $contents;
193        if (stripos(ltrim($contents), '<?') !== 0) {
194            $phpOpenerLen = strlen("<?php\n");
195            $parseContent = "<?php\n" . $contents;
196        }
197
198        $parser = (new ParserFactory())->createForNewestSupportedVersion();
199        $errorHandler = new \PhpParser\ErrorHandler\Collecting();
200        $ast = null;
201
202        $positions = [];
203
204        try {
205            $ast = $parser->parse($parseContent);
206//                $ast = $parser->parse($parseContent, $errorHandler);
207        } catch (\Exception $e) {
208            // This happens in template files, E.g `x.blade.php`.
209            $this->logger->warning("Skipping Prefixing in {filePath} due to parse error: " . $e->getMessage(), [
210                'filePath' => $fileAbsolutePath ?? 'file',
211            ]);
212            return $contents;
213        }
214
215        if (is_null($ast)) {
216            return $contents;
217        }
218
219        $positions = array_merge(
220            $positions,
221            $this->replaceNamespaces($ast, $discoveredSymbols->getNamespaces()->getToRename()),
222            $this->findGlobalSymbolsPositionsInAst($ast, $discoveredSymbols->getGlobalClassesInterfacesTraits()->getToRename()),
223            $this->replaceConstFetchNamespaces($discoveredSymbols, $ast),
224        );
225
226        // Adjust positions to be relative to the original $contents (before any <?php prepend).
227        if ($phpOpenerLen > 0) {
228            $positions = array_values(array_filter(
229                array_map(function ($pos) use ($phpOpenerLen) {
230                    $pos['start'] -= $phpOpenerLen;
231                    $pos['end'] -= $phpOpenerLen;
232                    return $pos;
233                }, $positions),
234                fn($pos) => $pos['start'] >= 0
235            ));
236        }
237
238        usort($positions, fn($a, $b) => $b['start'] <=> $a['start']);
239
240        $removeDuplicatePositions = [];
241        foreach ($positions as $postition) {
242//            if(isset($removeDuplicatePositions[$postition['start']])){
243//            }
244            $removeDuplicatePositions[$postition['start']] = $postition;
245        }
246        $positions = $removeDuplicatePositions;
247
248        foreach ($positions as $pos) {
249            $contents = substr_replace($contents, $pos['replacement'], $pos['start'], $pos['end'] - $pos['start']);
250        }
251
252        // TODO: Use AST.
253        foreach ($functions as $functionSymbol) {
254            $contents = $this->replaceFunctions($contents, $functionSymbol);
255        }
256
257        // TODO: Use AST.
258        if (!is_null($this->config->getConstantsPrefix())) {
259            $contents = $this->replaceConstants($contents, $constants, $this->config->getConstantsPrefix());
260        }
261
262        // The following are for replacing symbols inside strings.
263        // TODO: When functions and constants are implemented via AST, their respective string replacement part will need to be added here.
264
265        // TODO: filter to only namespaces of more than a single depth.
266        foreach ($discoveredSymbols->getNamespaces()->getToRename() as $namespaceSymbol) {
267            $contents = $this->replaceSingleClassnameInString($contents, $namespaceSymbol);
268        }
269
270        /** @var ClassSymbol $classSymbol */
271        foreach ($discoveredSymbols->getClassesInterfacesTraits()->getToRename() as $classSymbol) {
272            $contents = $this->replaceSingleClassnameInString($contents, $classSymbol);
273        }
274
275        return $contents;
276    }
277
278    protected function replaceConstFetchNamespaces(DiscoveredSymbols $symbols, array $ast): array
279    {
280        $namespaceSymbols = $symbols->getDiscoveredNamespaces();
281        $namespaceSymbolsArray = $namespaceSymbols->toArray();
282        if (empty($namespaceSymbolsArray)) {
283            return [];
284        }
285
286        $nodeFinder = new NodeFinder();
287        $positions = [];
288
289        /** @var ConstFetch[] $constFetches */
290        $constFetches = $nodeFinder->find($ast, function (Node $node) {
291            return $node instanceof ConstFetch
292                && $node->name instanceof Name\FullyQualified;
293        });
294
295        foreach ($constFetches as $fetch) {
296            $full = $fetch->name->toString();
297            $parts = explode('\\', $full);
298            $namespace = $parts[0] ?? null;
299
300            if ($namespace && isset($namespaceSymbolsArray[$namespace])) {
301                $replacementNamespace = $namespaceSymbolsArray[$namespace]->getLocalReplacement();
302                $parts[0] = $replacementNamespace;
303                $newName = '\\' . implode('\\', $parts);
304
305                $positions[] = [
306                    'start' => $fetch->name->getStartFilePos(),
307                    'end' => $fetch->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
308                    'replacement' => $newName,
309                ];
310            }
311        }
312
313        return $positions;
314    }
315
316    protected function replaceNamespaces(array $ast, DiscoveredSymbols $namespaceChanges): array
317    {
318        if (empty($namespaceChanges->toArray())) {
319            return [];
320        }
321
322        $nsMap = [];
323        foreach ($namespaceChanges as $change) {
324            $original = rtrim($change->getOriginalSymbol(), '\\');
325            $replacement = rtrim($change->getReplacementFqdnName(), '\\');
326            $nsMap[$original] = $replacement;
327        }
328        uksort($nsMap, fn($a, $b) => strlen($b) - strlen($a));
329
330        $nodeFinder = new NodeFinder();
331        $positions = [];
332        $handled = [];
333
334        $findMatch = function (string $nameStr) use ($nsMap): ?array {
335            foreach ($nsMap as $original => $replacement) {
336                if ($nameStr === $original || str_starts_with($nameStr, $original . '\\')) {
337                    return ['original' => $original, 'replacement' => $replacement];
338                }
339            }
340            return null;
341        };
342
343        $findPrefixMatch = function (string $nameStr) use ($nsMap): ?array {
344            foreach ($nsMap as $original => $replacement) {
345                if (str_starts_with($nameStr, $original . '\\')) {
346                    return ['original' => $original, 'replacement' => $replacement];
347                }
348            }
349            return null;
350        };
351
352        $prefixed = function (string $nameStr, string $original, string $replacement): string {
353            return $replacement . substr($nameStr, strlen($original));
354        };
355
356        // A: namespace declarations — keep relative (no leading \)
357        foreach ($nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Namespace_::class) as $ns) {
358            if ($ns->name !== null && ($match = $findMatch($ns->name->toString()))) {
359                $positions[] = [
360                    'start' => $ns->name->getStartFilePos(),
361                    'end' => $ns->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
362                    'replacement' => $prefixed($ns->name->toString(), $match['original'], $match['replacement']),
363                ];
364                $handled[$ns->name->getStartFilePos()] = true;
365            }
366        }
367
368        // B: use items and group-use prefixes — keep relative (no leading \)
369        foreach ($nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, \PhpParser\Node\UseItem::class) as $item) {
370            if ($match = $findMatch($item->name->toString())) {
371                $positions[] = [
372                    'start' => $item->name->getStartFilePos(),
373                    'end' => $item->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
374                    'replacement' => $prefixed($item->name->toString(), $match['original'], $match['replacement']),
375                ];
376                $handled[$item->name->getStartFilePos()] = true;
377            }
378        }
379        foreach ($nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\GroupUse::class) as $groupUse) {
380            if ($groupUse->prefix !== null && ($match = $findMatch($groupUse->prefix->toString()))) {
381                $positions[] = [
382                    'start' => $groupUse->prefix->getStartFilePos(),
383                    'end' => $groupUse->prefix->getEndFilePos() + 1,
384                    'replacement' => $prefixed($groupUse->prefix->toString(), $match['original'], $match['replacement']),
385                ];
386                $handled[$groupUse->prefix->getStartFilePos()] = true;
387            }
388        }
389
390        // C: fully-qualified Name nodes — retain leading \
391        foreach ($nodeFinder->find($ast, function (Node $node) use ($findMatch) {
392            return $node instanceof Name\FullyQualified && $findMatch($node->toString()) !== null;
393        }) as $name) {
394            if (isset($handled[$name->getStartFilePos()])) {
395                continue;
396            }
397            $match = $findMatch($name->toString());
398            $positions[] = [
399                'start' => $name->getStartFilePos(),
400                'end' => $name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
401                'replacement' => '\\' . $prefixed($name->toString(), $match['original'], $match['replacement']),
402            ];
403            $handled[$name->getStartFilePos()] = true;
404        }
405
406        // D: relative Name nodes used as namespace prefixes in code — promote to FQ.
407        foreach ($nodeFinder->find($ast, function (Node $node) use ($findPrefixMatch) {
408            return $node instanceof Name
409                && !($node instanceof Name\FullyQualified)
410                && $findPrefixMatch($node->toString()) !== null;
411        }) as $name) {
412            if (isset($handled[$name->getStartFilePos()])) {
413                continue;
414            }
415            $match = $findPrefixMatch($name->toString());
416            $positions[] = [
417                'start' => $name->getStartFilePos(),
418                'end' => $name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
419                'replacement' => '\\' . $prefixed($name->toString(), $match['original'], $match['replacement']),
420            ];
421        }
422
423        // Doc comments: scan for \OriginalNamespace references in @param/@return/etc.
424        foreach ($nodeFinder->find($ast, function (Node $node) {
425            return $node->getDocComment() !== null;
426        }) as $node) {
427            $doc = $node->getDocComment();
428            $text = $doc->getText();
429            foreach ($nsMap as $original => $replacement) {
430                $docSearchStr = '\\' . $original;
431                $docSearchLen = strlen($docSearchStr);
432                $offset = 0;
433                while (($pos = strpos($text, $docSearchStr, $offset)) !== false) {
434                    $after = $pos + $docSearchLen;
435                    if ($after >= strlen($text)
436                        || !preg_match('/[a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff]/', $text[$after])
437                    ) {
438                        $positions[] = [
439                            'start' => $doc->getStartFilePos() + $pos,
440                            'end' => $doc->getStartFilePos() + $after,
441                            'replacement' => '\\' . $replacement,
442                        ];
443                    }
444                    $offset = $pos + 1;
445                }
446            }
447        }
448
449        return $positions;
450    }
451
452    protected function findGlobalSymbolsPositionsInComment(Comment $comment, DiscoveredSymbols $globalSymbols): array
453    {
454        $positions = [];
455        foreach ($globalSymbols->getGlobalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename() as $discoveredSymbol) {
456            $positions = array_merge($positions, $this->findGlobalSymbolPositionInComment($comment, $discoveredSymbol));
457        }
458        return $positions;
459    }
460
461    protected function findGlobalSymbolPositionInComment(Comment $comment, DiscoveredSymbol $globalSymbol): array
462    {
463        $positions = [];
464
465        $searchStr = '\\' . $globalSymbol->getOriginalSymbol();
466        $searchLen = strlen($searchStr);
467
468        $commentText = $comment->getText();
469        $startFilePos = $comment->getStartFilePos();
470        $offset = 0;
471        while (($pos = strpos($commentText, $searchStr, $offset)) !== false) {
472            $nextPos = $pos + $searchLen;
473            if ($nextPos >= strlen($commentText)
474                || !preg_match('/[a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff\\\\]/', $commentText[$nextPos])
475            ) {
476                $positions[] = [
477                    'start' => $startFilePos + $pos,
478                    'end' => $startFilePos + $nextPos,
479                    'replacement' => '\\' . $globalSymbol->getLocalReplacement(),
480                ];
481            }
482            $offset = $pos + 1;
483        }
484
485        return $positions;
486    }
487
488    protected function replaceSingleClassnameInString(string $contents, DiscoveredSymbol $symbol): string
489    {
490        $alsoSearchForVariableClassname = false;
491
492        if ($symbol instanceof NamespacedSymbol && $symbol->getNamespace()->isGlobal()) {
493            $replacementSymbolString = $symbol->getLocalReplacement();
494            $originalSymbolString    = $symbol->getOriginalSymbolStripPrefix($this->config->getClassmapPrefix());
495        } elseif ($symbol instanceof NamespaceSymbol) {
496            if ($symbol->isGlobal()) {
497                return $contents;
498            }
499            $originalSymbolString = $symbol->getOriginalSymbol();
500            $replacementSymbolString = $symbol->getReplacementFqdnName();
501
502            // E.g. `My\Namespace\$var` is used in some libraries.
503            $alsoSearchForVariableClassname = true;
504        } else {
505            $originalSymbolString = $symbol->getOriginalFqdnName();
506            $replacementSymbolString = $symbol->getFqdnReplacement();
507        }
508
509        /**
510         * Replace classnames in strings, e.g. `is_a( $recurrence, 'CronExpression' )`.
511         *
512         * `[^a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff\\\\]+` is anything but classname valid characters.
513         *
514         * TODO: Run this without the classname characters, log everytime a replacement is made across all test cases, add those to the test assertions, ensure this is always correct.
515         */
516        $pattern =    '/
517(
518                            [^a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff\\\\]
519                            [\'"]
520                            [\\\\]{0,2}
521)
522                        ('
523                            . str_replace('\\', '[\\\\]{1,2}', $originalSymbolString) .
524                        ')(
525                        '
526                      . ( $alsoSearchForVariableClassname ? '([\\\\]{1,2}\$[a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff]*)?' : '' ) .
527                      '
528                            [\'"]
529                            [^a-zA-Z0-9_\x7f-\xff\\\\]
530)
531                        /Ux';       // U: Non-greedy matching, x: ignore whitespace in pattern.
532
533        /**
534         * If $alsoSearchForVariableClassname the number of elements in the array is more
535         *
536         * @param array<array<string>> $capture
537         *
538         * @return string
539         */
540        $replacement = function (array $capture) use ($originalSymbolString, $replacementSymbolString, $alsoSearchForVariableClassname) {
541
542            if ($capture[2] === $originalSymbolString) {
543                $capture[2] = $replacementSymbolString;
544            }
545
546            if ($capture[2] === str_replace('\\', '\\\\', $originalSymbolString)) {
547                $capture[2] = str_replace('\\', '\\\\', $replacementSymbolString);
548            }
549
550            unset($capture[0]);
551            unset($capture[4]);
552
553            return implode('', $capture);
554        };
555
556        $contents = preg_replace_callback($pattern, $replacement, $contents);
557
558        return $contents;
559    }
560
561    /**
562     * In a namespace:
563     * * use \Classname;
564     * * new \Classname()
565     *
566     * In a global namespace:
567     * * new Classname()
568     *
569     * @param string $contents
570     * @param string $originalClassname
571     * @param string $classnamePrefix
572     */
573    public function findGlobalSymbolsPositionsInAst(array $ast, DiscoveredSymbols $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename): array
574    {
575        if (empty($globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename)) {
576            return [];
577        }
578
579        $nodeFinder = new NodeFinder();
580        $positions = [];
581
582        // Replace \Classname (fully qualified) references in any namespace context.
583        $fqNodes = $nodeFinder->find($ast, function (Node $node) use ($globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename, &$positions) {
584            if ($node->getAttribute('comments')) {
585                /** @var \PhpParser\Comment\Doc $comment */
586                $comment = $node->getAttribute('comments')[0];
587                $positions = array_merge(
588                    $positions,
589                    $this->findGlobalSymbolsPositionsInComment($comment, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename)
590                );
591            }
592            if (!( $node instanceof Name\FullyQualified )) {
593                return false;
594            }
595            return $this->hasGlobalSymbolForNode($node, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename);
596        });
597
598        foreach ($fqNodes as $node) {
599            $positions[] = [
600                'start' => $node->getStartFilePos(),
601                'end' => $node->getEndFilePos() + 1,
602                'replacement' => '\\' . $this->getReplacementStringForNode($node, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename),
603            ];
604        }
605
606        // In named namespaces, `use Classname;` must become `use PrefixedClassname as Classname;`
607        // so that unqualified references within the namespace continue to resolve correctly.
608        $namedNamespaces = array_filter(
609            $nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Namespace_::class),
610            fn($ns) => $ns->name !== null
611        );
612        foreach ($namedNamespaces as $nsStmt) {
613            $useItems = $nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($nsStmt->stmts ?? [], \PhpParser\Node\UseItem::class);
614            foreach ($useItems as $useItem) {
615                if (!($useItem->name instanceof Name\FullyQualified)
616                     && $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename->getClass($useItem->name->toString())
617                ) {
618                    $symbol = $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename->getClass($useItem->name->toString());
619                    if ($symbol->isDoRename()) {
620                        $replacementClassname = $symbol->getLocalReplacement();
621                        $useClassname = array_reverse(explode('\\', $useItem->name->toString()))[0];
622
623                        $replacementString = $symbol->getLocalReplacement();
624                        if ($replacementClassname !== $useClassname && !$useItem->alias) {
625                            $replacementString .= ' as ' . $useClassname;
626                        }
627
628                        $positions[] = [
629                            'start' => $useItem->name->getStartFilePos(),
630                            'end' => $useItem->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
631                            'replacement' => $replacementString,
632                        ];
633                    }
634                }
635            }
636        }
637
638        // In global namespace context (either implicit, or explicit `namespace {}`), replace
639        // unqualified class name references and class/interface/trait/enum declarations.
640        $globalStmts = [];
641        foreach ($ast as $node) {
642            if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Namespace_) {
643                if ($node->name === null) {
644                    $globalStmts = array_merge($globalStmts, $node->stmts ?? []);
645                }
646            } else {
647                $globalStmts[] = $node;
648            }
649        }
650
651        $classLike = $nodeFinder->find($globalStmts, function (Node $node) use ($globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename) {
652            return ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Class_
653                || $node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Interface_
654                || $node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Trait_
655                || $node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Enum_)
656                && isset($node->name)
657                && $node->name instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Identifier
658                && (
659                       $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename->getClass($node->name->name)
660                       || $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename->getInterface($node->name->name)
661                       || $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename->getTrait($node->name->name)
662                   );
663        });
664        foreach ($classLike as $node) {
665            $positions[] = [
666                'start' => $node->name->getStartFilePos(),
667                'end' => $node->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
668                'replacement' => $this->getReplacementStringForNode($node, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename),
669            ];
670        }
671
672        $unqualifiedNameNodes = $nodeFinder->find($globalStmts, function (Node $node) use ($globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename) {
673            return $node instanceof Name
674                && !($node instanceof Name\FullyQualified)
675                   && $this->hasGlobalSymbolForNode($node, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename);
676        });
677        foreach ($unqualifiedNameNodes as $node) {
678            $positions[] = [
679                'start' => $node->getStartFilePos(),
680                'end' => $node->getEndFilePos() + 1,
681                'replacement' => $this->getReplacementStringForNode($node, $globalClassesInterfacesTraitsToRename)
682            ];
683        }
684
685        return $positions;
686    }
687
688    protected function hasGlobalSymbolForNode(\PhpParser\Node $node, DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols): bool
689    {
690        return (bool) $this->getGlobalSymbolForNode($node, $discoveredSymbols);
691    }
692
693    /**
694     * Try to get the specific class/interface/trait symbol by type and name.
695     * Failing that, return whichever of class/interface/trait is found first by name, or null.
696     *
697     * There should just be one of any global name: `use MyABC;` (a class) is indistinguishable from `use MyABC;` (an interface).
698     *
699     * @param Node\Stmt $node
700     * @param DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols
701     *
702     * @return DiscoveredSymbol|null
703     */
704    protected function getGlobalSymbolForNode(\PhpParser\Node $node, DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols): ?DiscoveredSymbol
705    {
706        if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Class_) {
707            return $discoveredSymbols->getClass($node->name->toString());
708        }
709        if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Interface_) {
710            return $discoveredSymbols->getInterface($node->name->toString());
711        }
712        if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Trait_) {
713            return $discoveredSymbols->getTrait($node->name->toString());
714        }
715        return $discoveredSymbols->getClass($node->toString())
716               ?? $discoveredSymbols->getInterface($node->toString())
717                ?? $discoveredSymbols->getTrait($node->toString());
718    }
719
720    protected function getReplacementStringForNode(\PhpParser\Node $node, DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredSymbols)
721    {
722        $globalSymbol = $this->getGlobalSymbolForNode($node, $discoveredSymbols);
723        if ($globalSymbol) {
724            return $globalSymbol->getLocalReplacement();
725        }
726        return $node->toString();
727    }
728
729
730    protected function checkPregError(): void
731    {
732        $matchingError = preg_last_error();
733        if (0 !== $matchingError) {
734            throw new Exception(preg_last_error_msg());
735        }
736    }
737
738    /**
739     * TODO: This should be split and brought to FileScanner.
740     *
741     * @param string $contents
742     * @param string[] $originalConstants
743     * @param string $prefix
744     */
745    protected function replaceConstants(string $contents, DiscoveredSymbols $originalConstants, string $prefix): string
746    {
747
748        foreach ($originalConstants as $constant) {
749            $contents = $this->replaceConstant($contents, $constant, $prefix . $constant);
750        }
751
752        return $contents;
753    }
754
755    protected function replaceConstant(string $contents, string $originalConstant, string $replacementConstant): string
756    {
757        return str_replace($originalConstant, $replacementConstant, $contents);
758    }
759
760    protected function replaceFunctions(string $contents, FunctionSymbol $functionSymbol): string
761    {
762        $originalFunctionString = $functionSymbol->getOriginalSymbol();
763        $replacementFunctionString = $functionSymbol->getLocalReplacement();
764
765        if ($originalFunctionString === $replacementFunctionString) {
766            return $contents;
767        }
768
769        $nodeFinder = new NodeFinder();
770        $parser = (new ParserFactory())->createForNewestSupportedVersion();
771        try {
772            $ast = $parser->parse($contents);
773        } catch (\PhpParser\Error $e) {
774            $this->logger->warning("Skipping ::replaceFunctions() in file due to parse error: " . $e->getMessage());
775            return $contents;
776        }
777
778        $positions = [];
779
780        // Function declarations (global only)
781        $functionDefs = $nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, Function_::class);
782        foreach ($functionDefs as $func) {
783            if ($func->name->name === $originalFunctionString) {
784                $positions[] = [
785                    'start' => $func->name->getStartFilePos(),
786                    'end' => $func->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
787                ];
788            }
789        }
790
791        // Calls (global only)
792        $calls = $nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($ast, FuncCall::class);
793        foreach ($calls as $call) {
794            if ($call->name instanceof Name &&
795                $call->name->toString() === $originalFunctionString
796            ) {
797                $positions[] = [
798                    'start' => $call->name->getStartFilePos(),
799                    'end' => $call->name->getEndFilePos() + 1,
800                ];
801            }
802        }
803
804        $functionsUsingCallable = [
805            'function_exists',
806            'call_user_func',
807            'call_user_func_array',
808            'forward_static_call',
809            'forward_static_call_array',
810            'register_shutdown_function',
811            'register_tick_function',
812            'unregister_tick_function',
813        ];
814
815        foreach ($calls as $call) {
816            if ($call->name instanceof Name &&
817                in_array($call->name->toString(), $functionsUsingCallable)
818                && isset($call->args[0])
819                && $call->args[0] instanceof Arg
820                && $call->args[0]->value instanceof String_
821                && $call->args[0]->value->value === $originalFunctionString
822            ) {
823                $positions[] = [
824                    'start' => $call->args[0]->value->getStartFilePos() + 1, // do not change quotes
825                    'end' => $call->args[0]->value->getEndFilePos(),
826                ];
827            }
828        }
829
830        if (empty($positions)) {
831            return $contents;
832        }
833
834        // We sort by start, from the end - so as not to break the positions after the substitution
835        usort($positions, fn($a, $b) => $b['start'] <=> $a['start']);
836
837        foreach ($positions as $pos) {
838            $contents = substr_replace($contents, $replacementFunctionString, $pos['start'], $pos['end'] - $pos['start']);
839        }
840        return $contents;
841    }
842
843    /**
844     * TODO: This should be a function on {@see DiscoveredFiles}.
845     *
846     * @return array<string, ComposerPackage>
847     */
848    public function getModifiedFiles(): array
849    {
850        return $this->changedFiles;
851    }
852
853    /**
854     * In the case of `use Namespaced\Traitname;` by `nette/latte`, the trait uses the full namespace but it is not
855     * preceded by a backslash. When everything is moved up a namespace level, this is a problem. I think being
856     * explicit about the namespace being a full namespace rather than a relative one should fix this.
857     *
858     * We will scan the file for `use Namespaced\Traitname` and replace it with `use \Namespaced\Traitname;`.
859     *
860     * @see https://github.com/nette/latte/blob/0ac0843a459790d471821f6a82f5d13db831a0d3/src/Latte/Loaders/FileLoader.php#L20
861     *
862     * @param string $phpFileContent
863     * @param DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredNamespaceSymbols
864     */
865    protected function prepareRelativeNamespaces(string $phpFileContent, DiscoveredSymbols $discoveredNamespaceSymbols): string
866    {
867        $discoveredNamespaceSymbolsArray = $discoveredNamespaceSymbols->toArray();
868
869        $parser = (new ParserFactory())->createForNewestSupportedVersion();
870
871        try {
872            $ast = $parser->parse($phpFileContent);
873        } catch (\PhpParser\Error $e) {
874            $this->logger->warning("Skipping ::prepareRelativeNamespaces() in file due to parse error: " . $e->getMessage());
875            return $phpFileContent;
876        }
877
878        $traverser = new NodeTraverser();
879        $visitor = new class($discoveredNamespaceSymbolsArray) extends \PhpParser\NodeVisitorAbstract {
880
881            public int $countChanges = 0;
882            /** @var string[] */
883            protected array $discoveredNamespaces;
884
885            protected Node $lastNode;
886
887            /**
888             * The list of `use Namespace\Subns;` statements in the file.
889             *
890             * @var string[]
891             */
892            protected array $using = [];
893
894            /**
895             * @param NamespaceSymbol[] $discoveredNamespaceSymbols
896             */
897            public function __construct(array $discoveredNamespaceSymbols)
898            {
899
900                $this->discoveredNamespaces = array_map(
901                    fn(NamespaceSymbol $symbol) => $symbol->getOriginalSymbol(),
902                    $discoveredNamespaceSymbols
903                );
904            }
905
906            public function leaveNode(Node $node)
907            {
908
909                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Namespace_) {
910                    $this->using[] = $node->name->name;
911                    $this->lastNode = $node;
912                    return $node;
913                }
914                // Probably the namespace declaration
915                if (empty($this->lastNode) && $node instanceof Name) {
916                    $this->using[] = $node->name;
917                    $this->lastNode = $node;
918                    return $node;
919                }
920                if ($node instanceof Name) {
921                    return $node;
922                }
923                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Use_) {
924                    foreach ($node->uses as $use) {
925                        $use->name->name = ltrim($use->name->name, '\\') ?: (function () {
926                            throw new Exception('$use->name->name was empty');
927                        })();
928                        $this->using[] = $use->name->name;
929                    }
930                    $this->lastNode = $node;
931                    return $node;
932                }
933                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\UseItem) {
934                    return $node;
935                }
936
937                $nameNodes = [];
938
939                $docComment = $node->getDocComment();
940                if ($docComment) {
941                    foreach ($this->discoveredNamespaces as $namespace) {
942                        $updatedDocCommentText = preg_replace(
943                            '/(.*\*\s*@\w+\s+)(' . preg_quote($namespace, '/') . ')/',
944                            '$1\\\\$2',
945                            $docComment->getText(),
946                            1,
947                            $count
948                        );
949                        if ($count > 0) {
950                            $this->countChanges++;
951                            $node->setDocComment(new \PhpParser\Comment\Doc($updatedDocCommentText));
952                            break;
953                        }
954                    }
955                }
956
957                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\TraitUse) {
958                    $nameNodes = array_merge($nameNodes, $node->traits);
959                }
960
961                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Param
962                    && $node->type instanceof Name
963                    && !($node->type instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
964                    $nameNodes[] = $node->type;
965                }
966
967                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\NullableType
968                    && $node->type instanceof Name
969                    && !($node->type instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
970                    $nameNodes[] = $node->type;
971                }
972
973                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\ClassMethod
974                    && $node->returnType instanceof Name
975                    && !($node->returnType instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
976                    $nameNodes[] = $node->returnType;
977                }
978
979                if ($node instanceof ClassConstFetch
980                    && $node->class instanceof Name
981                    && !($node->class instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
982                    $nameNodes[] = $node->class;
983                }
984
985                if ($node instanceof Node\Expr\New_
986                    && $node->class instanceof Name
987                    && !($node->class instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
988                    $nameNodes[] = $node->class;
989                }
990
991                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Expr\StaticPropertyFetch
992                    && $node->class instanceof Name
993                    && !($node->class instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
994                    $nameNodes[] = $node->class;
995                }
996
997                if (property_exists($node, 'name')
998                    && $node->name instanceof Name
999                    && !($node->name instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)
1000                ) {
1001                    $nameNodes[] = $node->name;
1002                }
1003
1004                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Expr\StaticCall) {
1005                    if (!method_exists($node->class, 'isFullyQualified') || !$node->class->isFullyQualified()) {
1006                        $nameNodes[] = $node->class;
1007                    }
1008                }
1009
1010                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\TryCatch) {
1011                    foreach ($node->catches as $catch) {
1012                        foreach ($catch->types as $catchType) {
1013                            if ($catchType instanceof Name
1014                                && !($catchType instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)
1015                            ) {
1016                                $nameNodes[] = $catchType;
1017                            }
1018                        }
1019                    }
1020                }
1021
1022                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Class_) {
1023                    foreach ($node->implements as $implement) {
1024                        if ($implement instanceof Name
1025                            && !($implement instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
1026                            $nameNodes[] = $implement;
1027                        }
1028                    }
1029                }
1030                if ($node instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Expr\Instanceof_
1031                    && $node->class instanceof Name
1032                    && !($node->class instanceof \PhpParser\Node\Name\FullyQualified)) {
1033                    $nameNodes[] = $node->class;
1034                }
1035
1036                foreach ($nameNodes as $nameNode) {
1037                    if (!property_exists($nameNode, 'name')) {
1038                        continue;
1039                    }
1040                    // If the name contains a `\` but does not begin with one, it may be a relative namespace;
1041                    if (false !== strpos($nameNode->name, '\\') && 0 !== strpos($nameNode->name, '\\')) {
1042                        $parts = explode('\\', $nameNode->name);
1043                        array_pop($parts);
1044                        $namespace = implode('\\', $parts);
1045                        if (in_array($namespace, $this->discoveredNamespaces)) {
1046                            $nameNode->name = '\\' . $nameNode->name;
1047                            $this->countChanges++;
1048                        } else {
1049                            foreach ($this->using as $namespaceBase) {
1050                                if (in_array($namespaceBase . '\\' . $namespace, $this->discoveredNamespaces)) {
1051                                    $nameNode->name = '\\' . $namespaceBase . '\\' . $nameNode->name;
1052                                    $this->countChanges++;
1053                                    break;
1054                                }
1055                            }
1056                        }
1057                    }
1058                }
1059                $this->lastNode = $node;
1060                return $node;
1061            }
1062        };
1063        $traverser->addVisitor($visitor);
1064
1065        $modifiedStmts = $traverser->traverse($ast);
1066
1067        if ($visitor->countChanges === 0) {
1068            return $phpFileContent;
1069        }
1070
1071        $updatedContent = (new Standard())->prettyPrintFile($modifiedStmts);
1072
1073        $updatedContent = str_replace('namespace \\', 'namespace ', $updatedContent);
1074        $updatedContent = str_replace('use \\\\', 'use \\', $updatedContent);
1075
1076        return $updatedContent;
1077    }
1078}
